entities.name: TROPHURUS LONGIMARGINATUS
entities.description: A species of nematode described from soil around roots of West Indian mahogany and pigeon pea

entities.name: WEST INDIAN MAHOGANY
entities.description: A host plant (Swietenia mahogany Jaca.) found in Puerto Rico

entities.name: PUERTO RICO
entities.description: The location where Trophurus longimarginatus was first described

entities.name: PIGEON PEA
entities.description: A host plant where a large Trophurus sp. population was found in India

entities.name: ICRISAT PATANCHERU
entities.description: The research farm in Andhra Pradesh, India where the nematode population was collected

entities.name: ANDHRA PRADESH
entities.description: The state in India where the ICRISAT research farm is located

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the nematode population was collected

entities.name: TROPHURUS IMPAR
entities.description: A nematode species considered a junior synonym of Trophurus longimarginatus

entities.name: JUNIOR SYNONYM
entities.description: A taxonomic term indicating that a name is a later synonym of an earlier name

entities.name: HEAT-KILLING
entities.description: A process used to kill nematode specimens

entities.name: FORMALIN FIXATION
entities.description: A process of fixing specimens in 4% formalin

entities.name: DEHYDRATION
entities.description: A process of removing water from specimens

entities.name: GLYCERINE MOUNTING
entities.description: A process of mounting specimens in anhydrous glycerine

entities.name: OCULAR MICROMETRY
entities.description: A measurement technique using an ocular micrometer
